name: Broccoli a La Dolores
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Steam the broccoli in a large saucepan until fork-tender.
3. Melt the Velveeta cheese in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. Add milk, onion, and red bell pepper to the melted cheese. Stir until well blended.
5. Layer the ingredients in a large casserole dish, starting with the melted cheese.
6. Add the broccoli and sprinkle with cracker crumbs.
7. Dot the crumb layer with butter.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 two more times.
9. Finish by sprinkling additional cracker crumbs on top.
10. Cover and bake for 20 minutes.
11. Remove cover and bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the crumb topping is lightly browned.
